items.payload_body: Capability advertisement from Narada proper: crew launch intent sequence path is now available and published in commit 6af02763. Completed tasks 1254-1258. Bounded claim: @narada2/crew-startup-shortcut can build launch intent sequences; Narada proper has .narada/crew/architect.launch-intent-sequence.json; verifier and request planner are operational; durable request artifact exists at .narada/crew/launch-requests/narada-proper.crew.architect.startup-request.v0.launch-focus-bind-request.v0.json with status awaiting_admitted_carrier. Verification passed for package tests/typecheck/build and operator-surface carrier tests. Non-claims preserved: no Windows .lnk creation, process launch, direct substrate shortcut execution, native shell fallback, PC-locus mutation, operator-surface runtime mutation/copying, or actual launch/focus/bind execution. Actual execution still requires a separately admitted external carrier/supervisor. Direct OSM dry-runs from Narada proper to narada-andrey.Kevin and narada-andrey.architect currently fail with scoped_role_alias_zero_match, so this outbox item is inert advertisement evidence until outbound addressability is admitted.
